topic: Why arrhythmias often happen at night
caption:
Did you know arrhythmias often strike at night? 🌃 Learn why your heart rhythm can go awry in the dark. 💡 Here are 5 key facts: 
1️⃣ Sleep position can put pressure on your heart. 
2️⃣ Dehydration from a day without enough water can trigger arrhythmias. 
3️⃣ Certain medications peak at night, disrupting heart rhythm. 
4️⃣ Hormonal changes during sleep affect heart rate. 
5️⃣ Stress and anxiety can cause nocturnal arrhythmias. 😌 
Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future heart will thank you. 💖 #arrhythmia #hearthealth #nocturnalarrhythmias #sleephealth #cardiology
